name: accounting firms managing 10-20 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms managing 10-20 clients/month, manual forecasting causes cash flow gaps. We automate cash flow forecasts instead of manual cash flow forecasting using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts leading to financial mismanagement.
